name: Chico Buarque
abstract: Francisco Buarque de Hollanda (born 19 June 1944), popularly known as Chico Buarque (Brazilian Portuguese pronunciation: [ˈʃikʊ buˈahki]), is a Brazilian singer-songwriter, guitarist, composer, playwright, writer, and poet. He is best known for his music, which often includes social, economic, and cultural reflections on Brazil.

about_quotes.speaker: Toots Thielemans
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Joao Bosco, Chico Buarque… >> [INTERVIEWEE] Chico Buarque.
about_quotes.doc_title: Toots Thielemans — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
